name: Beauty and the Beast: Hidden Objects
short_description: Step into the magical world of Beauty and the Beast! Explore stunning scenes and richly animated environments in this classic Hidden Object adventure. Help Belle overcome every challenge and discover the true power of love.
detailed_description:
🌹 ABOUT THIS GAME

Step into the magical world of Beauty and the Beast, the beloved fairy tale brought to life as a captivating Hidden Object adventure. Explore richly detailed scenes, search for hidden clues, and help Belle uncover the mysteries of the enchanted castle.

Perfect for casual players, fairy tale fans, and families alike.

🔍 GAMEPLAY FEATURES

  • Immersive 360° panoramas and beautiful 3D visual effects

  • Gorgeous interiors packed with interactive elements and secrets

  • Replayable levels with two different item sets per scene

  • Score-based mode for players who love a competitive challenge

  • Relaxed or competitive playstyles supported

📖 THE STORY

In a distant kingdom, a proud young prince is cursed by a powerful witch and turned into a beast. His once-vibrant castle is left in decay, and his heart grows cold. Years later, Belle, a kind-hearted girl, stumbles upon the forgotten castle and meets the beast face to face.

Through courage, kindness, and love, she begins to unravel the curse and discover the man hidden within the monster.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Arabic, Portuguese - Brazil, Traditional Chinese, Simplified Chinese, Korean, Dutch, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Turkish, Ukrainian, Czech, Japanese
